& mobile applications
in Valais

custom websites, high-performance SEO, eco-friendly practices

  • Website creation
  • Mobile applications
  • SEO optimization

My services

Why choose Helveclick

For fast, high‑performance and eco‑responsible websites

I create lightweight websites that load quickly by avoiding the use of heavy frameworks or resource-intensive CMS. This optimizes the loading speed of your site while providing a smooth user experience. With an eco-designed approach, I ensure that each site respects the environment by optimizing energy consumption and reducing carbon footprint. I strive to stay as close as possible to the Green IT recommendations, to adopt responsible and sustainable practices at every stage of development.

For custom solutions, tailored to your specific needs

Each project is unique. Whether you need a showcase website, an online store, a mobile application, I design personalized solutions that specifically meet your needs. With an intuitive interface and adapted to your users, I ensure that every feature of the site is designed to maximize engagement of your visitors and convert prospects into customers.

For human and personalized support

Working with me means having the assurance of personalized support throughout your project. I listen carefully to you, I answer all your questions, and I'm available to discuss necessary adjustments at each stage. My approach is transparent, and I make it a point of honor to respect your deadlines and deliver impeccable quality.

For guaranteed quality

I am committed to delivering a robust final product, meticulously crafted down to the smallest detail, and designed to provide an optimal user experience. Every project is designed to be scalable and easily maintainable, in order to adapt sustainably to your future needs.

My values

Customer satisfaction

Your satisfaction is at the heart of my work. I’m committed to delivering a solution that fully meets your needs.

I remain available and attentive after delivery — to adjust, improve, or simply support you. My goal: a successful project built on trust.

Quality

I design reliable websites, built for smooth navigation, optimal performance, and accessible user experience. Each project is crafted with care to deliver a durable and truly tailored solution to your needs.

Eco-design

I believe the web can be more eco-friendly. That’s why I integrate sustainable web design into every project: reduced energy consumption, lightweight files, and green hosting. The result? A fast, efficient, and environmentally conscious digital solution.

  • Optimized images and files: Smart compression of images, videos, and resources for faster loading and lower energy usage.

  • Fewer requests, more efficiency: Minimizing server requests (CSS, JS, fonts...) to reduce data transfer and improve performance.

  • Green hosting: Partnering with providers that run on renewable energy and follow sustainable practices.

  • Clean code: Minimal and efficient development to reduce resource consumption and improve speed.

  • Thoughtful content: Fewer unnecessary animations, more simplicity—for a lighter, faster, and more accessible experience.

  • Mobile-first design: Built primarily for smartphones to save energy and deliver a smooth experience on all devices.

Transparency

I work with complete transparency: you're informed at every stage, from the budget to the technical choices. All decisions are made together, in a spirit of trust and clarity. My goal is to ensure honest, straightforward communication so you always feel confident and involved.

FAQ

Why choose eco-responsible web development ?

Eco-responsible web development helps reduce the energy footprint and maximize the efficiency of used resources. Each project is designed to be fast, lightweight, and optimized, thereby reducing its environmental impact. By choosing this approach, you actively contribute to more sustainable digital development.

Why choose my independent web agency for your project ?

By working with my independent web agency, you benefit from the flexibility and proximity of a freelance developer, while enjoying a structured and professional approach comparable to that of a traditional agency.
I am your single point of contact, involved at every stage of the project : strategy, design, development, and follow-up. This organization ensures smooth communication, high responsiveness, and a clear understanding of your needs.
My pricing is generally more controlled than that of a traditional agency, without compromising on quality, technical rigor, and custom-built solutions. When necessary, I also rely on a network of specialized partners to address specific needs.

What are the prices for custom web development ?

Pricing depends on the complexity, features, and objectives of your project. I provide customized quotes, clear, and detailed, tailored to your actual needs.
As an indication, a showcase website of 4 to 6 pages starts from CHF 1’500. The development of a custom web application (SaaS) generally starts around CHF 20’000 and can go well beyond, depending on technical complexity, integrations, security requirements, and expected scalability.
For SaaS projects and mobile applications, I often recommend starting with a MVP (Minimum Viable Product): a first functional version focused on essentials, allowing you to validate the concept, gather user feedback, and evolve progressively toward a more complete product while keeping costs under control.
My commitment : to deliver a sustainable solution, a fair quote, and no hidden costs, with a clear vision of pricing, priorities, and project milestones.

Do you offer SEO and AI-driven optimization services (GEO) ?

Yes. Every project I develop includes comprehensive search engine optimization (SEO) from the design phase. I apply technical and editorial best practices to ensure long-term visibility on search engines.
I also optimize your website for loading speed, content structure, and user experience, which are essential criteria for both traditional SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).
GEO aims to make your website understandable, relevant, and usable by AI-powered search engines and AI assistants, strengthening your visibility in emerging search behaviors.

What are the steps of the web development process ?

The process is divided into several key stages :

  • Needs analysis : I start by understanding your objectives to define the project specifications.
  • Design : Creation of the site architecture and visual identity, with a strong focus on user experience.
  • Development : Building the website or application according to the defined specifications.
  • Testing : Performance, security, and compatibility testing across devices and browsers.
  • Launch and follow-up : Deployment after final validation and testing. I also offer monitoring and maintenance services to ensure your website remains performant and secure over time.

What type of projects can I entrust to a freelance developer like you ?

I handle a wide range of web projects, including: showcase websites, web and mobile application development, e-commerce solutions, custom platform development (SaaS), API integrations, and more. If you have an idea, I can turn it into a high-performance digital solution tailored to your specific goals.

Do you offer a referral or commission-based partnership program ?

No, I have made a conscious decision not to adopt a commission-based referral model, unlike certain practices in the market.
I believe it is ethically questionable to encourage students, individuals, or companies to recommend a business without necessarily having been clients or fully understanding its real value.
My growth relies exclusively on genuine client satisfaction, authentic word-of-mouth, and trust.
I prefer to be recommended for the quality of my work, my professionalism, and my results — not for a commission.
